data.description: BUILDPLAN M4 final sweep (BUILDPLAN id MA-22). e2e green on the NEW cassettes (after the human-track re-record); every harness H-1..H-9 green; debt-gates closeout. ACs: all (terminal). Depends: human-track re-record, MA-21. Size S.
data.title: Final sweep: harnesses green and debt-gates closeout

data.body: MA-22 complete through review. WHAT CHANGED: single commit 53dcc00 on claude/ma-22-final-sweep (base origin/main f176529) — .github/workflows/ci.yml flips E2E_REQUIRED "0"->"1", replaces the obsolete PARKED comment block with a LIVE note (post-MA-24: green run mechanically implies e2e replay executed and passed), renames the step 'e2e skip-if-unmet'->'e2e hard-gated'; cassette-miss diagnostics + GEMINI_DEBUG_PROMPTS retained. HARNESS RESULTS (all nine green): H-1 fmt PASS; H-2 clippy -D warnings PASS; H-3 cargo test workspace PASS (exit 0); H-4 tsc build PASS; H-5 biome PASS (60 files); H-6 fast suite PASS (152 tests, 4.26s); H-7 cargo audit + npm audit high PASS (0 vulns each); H-8 planted-defects PASS (16/16, G-1 intact); H-9 debt-gates PASS (9/9). LOCAL E2E_REQUIRED=1 PROOF: npm run test:full = 25 files, 153/153 tests, e2e replay ran to completion in cassette mode in 114.5s, exit 0. DEBT-GATES CLOSEOUT: all eight H-9-citing ACs (AC-7, AC-8, AC-12, AC-13, AC-22, AC-23, AC-25 x2, AC-34) have present-and-passing gates in scripts/debt-gates.sh — no missing gates for any merged workstream, no additions needed. DEVIATIONS FLAGGED: (1) lattice attach rejected --role validation (only role 'review' exists in this CLI) — validation evidence attached as a plain note instead; (2) lattice attach rejected --type reference with --inline — PR attached as reference with URL as SOURCE arg instead; (3) first backgrounded test:full run was killed with the turn end (orchestrator-confirmed) — re-run synchronously to completion, results above are from the synchronous run. PR: #65 (https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/65), OPEN, MERGEABLE, head 53dcc00 != base f176529, CI green at time of writing: Rust job pass 1m2s, TypeScript job pass 3m7s WITH the hard gate live. Ticket at review; stopping here per contract — Orchestrator merges.

Merged: PR #65 (https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/65) merge commit ecef4062b3dc500b0c06509baee4d9daa1b82476 at 2026-07-11T02:43:04Z, operator-authorized in chat ('merge pr 65'). Verified .state==MERGED via gh JSON. E2E_REQUIRED hard gate is LIVE on main; first CI-proven run of the flipped gate was this PR's own TS job. All H-1..H-9 green (delegator evidence on ticket). Terminal agent-track ticket: contract 9f72697 agent track is 29/29.
